headline: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) Stands Out in Caviar Cruise Screen for Quality Growth Investors
summary: Quality investing identifies companies with strong competitive advantages and sustainable growth. Pentair (PNR) excels in the Caviar Cruise screen with 68.4% ROIC, 93.97% profit quality, and low debt, making it a top-tier water solutions provider.
